title: 安田記念の後に・確かな異変

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki astounds and enraptures the audience
at the Yasuda Kinen, and her fans' expectations
for her continue to swell. Yet, I can't help but feel
that something was off about her performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My unease grows stronger, and I rush to find her.
Unfortunately, a worried Hishi Amazon informs
me that Fuji Kiseki has left without me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race is the autumn Tenno Sho. But first, I
need to find out what's wrong with Fuji Kiseki.
